🚀 Big Launches.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Efficient On-Device Diffusion LLM Inference with Mobile NPU
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: This paper presents a method for efficient on-device diffusion LLM inference using mobile NPUs.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: TwinBI: An Agentic Digital Twin for Efficient Augmented Interactions with Business Intelligence Dashboards
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: This paper proposes an agentic digital twin for efficient augmented interactions with business intelligence dashboards.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: When Sample Selection Bias Precipitates Model Collapse
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: This paper explores the impact of sample selection bias on model collapse in recursive training.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: The AI layoff wave is becoming a powder keg
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: The AI layoff wave is becoming a powder keg, with tens of thousands of workers being shown the door.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Hybrid Open-Ended Tri-Evolution Makes Better Deep Researcher
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This paper proposes a hybrid open-ended tri-evolution method for deep research and agent evolution.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Orchestra-o1: Omnimodal Agent Orchestration
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: This paper proposes an omnimodal agent orchestration framework for large language model-based agents.

tool_of_day.title: Efficient On-Device Diffusion LLM Inference with Mobile NPU
tool_of_day.summary: This paper presents a method for efficient on-device diffusion LLM inference using mobile NPUs.

hot_take: The AI industry is experiencing a wave of layoffs, but research and innovation continue to push the boundaries of what's possible with AI.
